title: Quantum Chaos is Quantum
author_string: Leone, Lorenzo, Oliviero, Salvatore F. E., Zhou, You, Hamma, Alioscia
publisher: Verein zur Forderung des Open Access Publizierens in den Quantenwissenschaften
abstract: It is well known that a quantum circuit onNqubits composed of Clifford gates with the addition ofknon Clifford gates can be simulated on a classical computer by an algorithm scaling aspoly(N)exp⁡(k)\cite{bravyi2016improved}. We show that, for a quantum circuit to simulate quantum chaotic behavior, it is both necessary and sufficient thatk=Θ(N). This result implies the impossibility of simulating quantum chaos on a classical computer.
